component: root test harness (run-tests.js / npm run test:root)
rootCause: The one-command harness treated an intermittent Vitest worker RPC timeout ("Timeout calling \"onTaskUpdate\"") as a hard failure even when test files passed, causing npm run test:root to exit non-zero.
resolution: Added a targeted one-time retry for the specific Vitest timeout signature in run-tests.js and added regression coverage so transient worker timeout flakes do not fail the full harness when retry succeeds.
